tool.name: WARC/ARC Indexer (warcio)

param.name: input
param.label: A gzipped WARC file which you would like to explore the contents of

data.name: output
data.label: An index of the contents of the inputted WARC file in line-delimited JSON

citations.citation: @misc{githubwarcio, author = {The warcio contributors}, year = {2026}, title = {warcio: WARC and ARC Streaming Library}, publisher = {GitHub}, journal = {GitHub repository}, url = {https://github.com/webrecorder/warcio}, }
